subject: Re: M on cryo-ET data refinement dialog and results
body:
Dear Florian,
Hi, have you solved this issue? I've encountered with similar issue when I 
try to run M refinement, it just start refine the tomostar files, really 
have no clue why.

Thank very much in advance!

Yours sincerely,
Linhua Tai

On Saturday, March 21, 2020 at 8:44:12 PM UTC+8, Florian Fäßler wrote:
>
> Dear all,
>
> after preparing subtomograms at 2x binning in warp and aligning them in 
> relion, I want to do the multi-particle refinement in M. I am trying to use 
> the version that has been included in warp 1.0.6 and the 1.0.7 installer 
> does not come with M (I saw that there might be an update available on 
> github, but I don't really have a clue how to compile it) . Creating a 
> population, specifying a source and creating a species work perfectly fine, 
> but when I hit the refine button M just starts with the refinement without 
> popping up the refinement setup described in the user guide. Further, M 
> changes only the .xml files within the associated warp project during the 
> refinement, and writes d_corr_[tomogramname].mrc files in the 
> warp-installation folder during refinement, the species folder ,however, 
> remains unchanged after the inital setup. Does anyone have a suggestion 
> what might be going on here?
>
> Best regards,
> Florian
>
>
